title: Robust Dutch Chicken Casserole
description: A hearty, low-calorie Dutch dish featuring garlic sauce and braised chicken, served in individual ramekins.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the chicken with salt, pepper, and thyme.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook the chicken until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and carrots to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, chicken broth, and garlic sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in the low-fat milk and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Divide the mixture among 6 ramekins and bake for 20 minutes, or until hot and bubbly.
Cook poultry to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F before serving.
